name: bens-buds-dev
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; if ! command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash; fi; export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"; export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"; if ! command -v gcloud >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo apt-get update; sudo apt-get install -y apt-transport-https ca-certificates gnupg curl; curl -fsSL https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt/doc/apt-key.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg; echo "deb [signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/cloud.google.gpg] https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt cloud-sdk main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-cloud-sdk.list >/dev/null; sudo apt-get update; sudo apt-get install -y google-cloud-cli; fi; bun --version; bun install; bun add -g next@latest; node --version; terraform -version; gcloud --version; docker --version'
